title: Copart's (CPRT) Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Sales Surge Y/Y
text: Copart (CPRT) reports robust earnings and sales in second-quarter fiscal 2022. Amid higher SG&A, the company sees an increase in operating income.

title: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.77% and 10.24%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Copart Reports Second Quarter Fiscal 2022 Financial Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) today reported financial results for the quarter ended January 31, 2022. For the three months ended January 31, 2022, revenue, gross profit, and net income were $867.5 million, $403.3 million, and $287.4 million, respectively. These represent an increase in revenue of $250.4 million, or 40.6%; an increase in gross profit of $95.8 million, or 31.2%; and an increase in net income of $94.0 million, or 48.6%, respectively, from the same period la

title: Can Copart (CPRT) Maintain its Earnings Beat Streak in Q2?
text: Our proven model does not conclusively predict an earnings beat for Copart (CPRT) for fiscal Q2 as it doesn't have the right combination of a positive ESP and a favorable Zacks Rank.

title: Copart, Inc. to Release Second Quarter Fiscal 2022 Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) announced today that it will release earnings for the second quarter of fiscal 2022 after the close of market on Wednesday, February 16, 2022. On Thursday, February 17, 2022, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (10:00 a.m. Central), Copart will conduct a conference call to discuss the results for the quarter.
